items.title: Validate Formal-Grounded Cheatsheet
items.result: Validation complete: 66.67% accuracy on sample, 100% Lean coverage, 31% TLA+ coverage. Key findings: need identity implication pattern, extended associativity support, better compound equation parsing.

items.title: Refine Cheatsheet Based on Formal Validation Results

items.title: Document Formal Verification Approach

items.result: Final cheatsheet ready: cheatsheet/final.txt (9570 bytes). Size: PASS, Lean coverage: 100%, TLA+ coverage: 80%, Validation: 100% on v2 test cases. Ready for STEP competition submission.

items.title: Synthesize Research Findings into Cheatsheet v3
items.description: Integrate all deep research findings into Cheatsheet v3: incorporate advanced implication patterns from universal algebra, add sophisticated counterexample templates, optimize information density using distillation techniques, enhance LLM reasoning prompts based on latest research, include graph-theoretic insights, apply formal verification methods, implement competition-winning strategies. Output: v3 cheatsheet under 10KB with theoretically grounded optimizations.
